# Starphone Project Context
# https://www.thestarphone.com

Starphone provides secure, reliable public communication solutions for extreme environments, from cities to space.
It leverages satellite uplinks, mesh networking, and AI-driven signal optimization to ensure connectivity where others fail.

## Core Features
- Satellite Link: Direct connection to LEO/GEO satellites.
- Mesh Network: Peer-to-peer booth connectivity.
- AI Optimization: Machine learning for best signal path.
- Solar Powered: Fully autonomous power system.

## API Endpoints
- /api/health: Service status and uptime.
- /api/parrot: Fun animation endpoint.
- /api/sensor-data: (Internal) Mock sensor data ingest.

## Documentation
- /docs: API documentation and integration guides.
- /how-it-works: Technical deep dive.
